name: shared-types
description: Type-safe shared types (Session, ApiResponse, GenerateRequest, ServerMessage, ClientMessage, AVVComponent, ComponentStatus) in @avv/shared

name: session-store
description: In-memory session store with create, get, update, list, delete operations

name: connection-store
description: WebSocket connection manager with per-session tracking, broadcast, and send

name: websocket-handler
description: Bun WebSocket handler with open/message/close and client message routing

name: session-routes
description: Session CRUD routes: GET /api/sessions, GET /api/sessions/:id, DELETE /api/sessions/:id

name: generate-route
description: POST /api/generate endpoint with validation, creates session and returns it

name: entry-point
description: Hono app with CORS, logger, route mounting, and Bun.serve with WebSocket upgrade at /ws

name: route-organization
description: Clean route organization with Hono router groups and barrel exports

name: type-check
description: All packages pass tsc --noEmit type checking
